event_id.Description: Event trigger code: Simultaneous: 28, Fast: 40, Fast+delay: 60, Slow: 100

condition.Description: Seven digits were presented under four conditions: (1) Simultaneous — all digits shown for 2800 ms; (2) Fast sequential — each digit shown for 400 ms; (3) Fast+delay sequential — each digit shown for 400 ms with a 600 ms interstimulus interval (ISI); and (4) Slow sequential — each digit shown for 1000 ms.

sequence.Description: Digits sequence presented in this trial

NCorrect.Description: Number of correctly recalled digits in correct order starting from the first digit

partialScore.Description: Number of correctly recalled digits in correct serial positions

triggerCorrect.Description: Correctness flags for each presented digit: 0 - error, 1 - correct recall
